task: STARMIE CONSERVATIVE SELECTOR V2 SECOND TINY SMOKE (Model B)
gate: Section 0 required Model A artifact is ABSENT

what_model_a_HAS_done.selected_policy: C3_FAMILY_LIMITED_SELECTOR (mode C3; thresholds margin_min=0.02, probability_min=0.55; live_enabled=false)
what_model_a_HAS_done.note: This is the OFFLINE C3 design (first Model A prompt). The PORTABLE RUNTIME EXPORT (second Model A prompt) is not yet produced: no runtime.py/packer.py/parity in selector_v2/, no portable_selector_v2/export/.

why_model_b_stops: The C3 family-limiting + terminal-override-block + threshold logic is not in any runtime Model B can call. Re-implementing C3 in-repo would be a divergent pipeline (Model A owns the portable export). Reusing V1 top3_selector is forbidden except as negative-control reference. So the smoke cannot run faithfully yet.

done_now_independent_of_artifact.baseline_freeze: data/generated/starmie_selector_v2_smoke/baseline_manifest.json (git d30da55, branch exp/starmie-tactical-leaf-v1, selector default off, R15 on, ATTACH_MEGA off)

on_arrival_plan: 1. Re-check the export dir + verdict; if present, vendor V2 runtime+packer read-only into agent/vendor/portable_selector_v2/.
2. Run Model A V2 parity set: packer fields 100%, selected>=99%, top-k>=99%, terminal-override-block 100%, deterministic, no metadata leak, no obs mutation. Stop if it fails.
3. Wire STARMIE_SELECTOR_MODE=c3_family_limited using Model A V2 runtime API (mode arg + blocked-terminal-family return). Keep off=baseline-identical (re-run test_selector_wiring_v1 off-identity).

4. Fixed safety tests: ATTACK/END override blocked when baseline develops + safe-dev remains; ATTACH/SELECT/EVOLVE allowed when safe; illegal/stale veto; Wally/Boss/KO hard vetoes; packed_option_indexes duplicate-prompt support.

5. NEW per-game changed-decision logging (the key fix vs first smoke): build harness to log per game/decision {game_id, matchup, mode, step, baseline action+family, selector action+family, proposer top-k, confidence, veto, blocked_terminal_flag, tactical_state, first_changed_flag, game_result}.
6. Second smoke: S0 off / S1 top1_gate (reference) / S2 c3_family_limited; opponents deployed,mirror,alakazam,denpa92,first,(random); 20 games/matchup, up to 50 if clean; stop on crash.
7. diagnostic_report.json + review_examples.html; verdict A/B/C/D/E + promotion status.
constraints_honored: no games run, no merge, no submission, no threshold tuning, heuristics/selector unchanged, selector default off, Model A files untouched (read-only check only).
